Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x531D "STARPAWS-0400-531D" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Star Paws.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Copied some init code from $5202 to $0400 so that the intro can be displayed (this was originally called earlier during the load routine).
